item.title: LEGO Icons Bouquet of Roses Artificial Flowers Set for Adults Botanical Collection Home or Office Décor Accessories Gifts for Women Men Her or Him Relaxing Activities 10328
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Icons Bouquet of Roses Artificial Flowers Set for Adults Botanical Collection Home or Office Décor Accessories Gifts for Women Men Her or Him Relaxing Activities 10328 here: ℹ️: Buildable LEGO flowers home décor – Indulge yourself or join friends for a mindful project building the LEGO Icons roses bouquet set for adults Christmas gift idea – Celebrate birthdays or surprise loved ones with LEGO flower bouquet for adult fans of LEGO building sets and home décor What’s in the box?
